title: Velvety Indulgent Kenyan Garlic Stir-fry
description: This low-calorie-friendly dish features dark rum and garlic to create a velvety, indulgent flavor profile that is perfect for a special dinner or dessert.
instructions: Blend the Dark Rum, minced onion, salt, and brown sugar in a small bowl until smooth.
In a wok or large skillet, heat oil over medium-high heat. Add garlic cloves, ground cinnamon, and blend mixture from step 1. Stir-fry for about 2 minutes until fragrant.
Add sesame seeds, almond flakes, dark chocolate chips, and Sesame Seeds to the pan. Toss ingredients together well.
Pour in coconut milk and stir continuously until a thick velvety sauce forms around the edges of the wok or skillet. Reduce heat to low and simmer for about 5 minutes.
Remove from heat and serve immediately with a side of dark rum ice cream if desired.
